inputs.offer_performance_data: Offer A (Monthly retainer $2,500/mo): 45 proposals sent, 8 closed (17.8 percent), avg LTV $15,000. Offer B (Project-based $8,500 one-time): 30 proposals sent, 11 closed (36.7 percent), avg LTV $8,500. Offer C (Hybrid: $5,000 setup + $1,200/mo): 22 proposals sent, 6 closed (27.3 percent), avg LTV $19,400. Offer D (Free audit + $3,500/mo): 18 proposals sent, 2 closed (11.1 percent), avg LTV $21,000.
